caption: A close-up shot focuses on the side of a white vehicle, featuring red and blue stripes along the top edge and the word "LANDCRUISER" in red text. Two logos are prominent on the door: a blue European Union flag accompanied by the text "funded by the European Union" and a circular blue logo depicting stylized figures within a globe, with "IOM • OIM" written underneath. The video remains static across the frames, with a slight shift in lighting and a very subtle change in perspective as the camera moves. The background is out of focus, showing a glimpse of a light-colored structure. Across the bottom of the frame, a subtitle reads, "but to help the Syrian refugees it's worth it". No people are visible in the scene.
